prompt:
Review my staged changes. I just added a FlexibleTLS wrapper to the HTTP provider in our service package.

assertions.text: The review identifies the comment naming buildProviders() or pkg/orchestrator/deploy.go as a dependency direction violation or architectural issue
The review explains that the comment couples downstream code to upstream implementation details that may change without notice
The review recommends rewriting the comment to use only concepts the current package owns
